message:
feat(tools): add CMA-ES hyperparameter optimizer for fusion pipeline

Add optimize-params tool that uses CMA-ES (Covariance Matrix Adaptation
Evolution Strategy) with 5-fold cross-validation to tune TwoTierConfig
parameters (quality_weight, rrf_k, candidate_multiplier, etc.) against
nDCG@10.

tools/optimize_params/:
- Cargo.toml: Workspace binary depending on frankensearch-core,
  frankensearch-fusion, and fastcma
- src/main.rs: CMA-ES optimization loop with configurable bounds,
  population size, and convergence criteria

data/:
- optimized_params.toml: Generated parameters from CMA-ES run
  (quality_weight=0.7208, rrf_k=60.04, baseline nDCG@10=0.2045)
- optimization_log.jsonl: Per-generation optimization trace for
  parameter provenance and reproducibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# Optimized TwoTierConfig parameters
+# Generated by optimize-params via CMA-ES with 5-fold CV
+# Baseline nDCG@10: 0.2045
+# Optimized nDCG@10: 0.2045
+# CV variance: 0.003561
+
+quality_weight = 0.7208283755085889
+rrf_k = 60.039881436598236
+candidate_multiplier = 3
+quality_timeout_ms = 500
+fast_only = false
+explain = false
+hnsw_ef_search = 100
+hnsw_ef_construction = 200
+hnsw_m = 16
+hnsw_threshold = 50000
+mrl_search_dims = 0
+mrl_rescore_top_k = 30

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+[package]
+name = "optimize-params"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "CMA-ES hyperparameter optimizer for frankensearch fusion pipeline"
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "optimize-params"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+frankensearch-core = { workspace = true }
+frankensearch-fusion = { workspace = true }
+fastcma = { path = "/dp/fast_cmaes", default-features = false, features = ["test_utils"] }
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+toml = { workspace = true }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
